mapper.sql: id, name, parent_id, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product_category WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_category (name, parent_id, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE product_category SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product_category SET sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM product_category WHERE id IN
#{id}
